input.command: REPO=$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner) && gh api "repos/$REPO/issues/36/comments" --jq '.[] | {user: .user.login, body: .body}'
REPO=$(gh repo view --json nameWithOwner -q .nameWithOwner) && gh pr view 36 --json reviews,comments,title,body

content.content:
{"body":"## Summary
- Add `GetRequest`, `DeleteRequest`, and `RetryRequest` to the Overseerr client with a new `delete()` HTTP helper
- Wire up three new agent tools: `get_request_detail`, `delete_request` (destructive), `retry_request` (destructive)
- Enrich the `Request` type with `UpdatedAt`, `Seasons`, and additional `MediaInfo` fields for the detail view
- Add httptest-based tests for all three new client methods

## Test plan
- [x] `go build ./...` passes
- [x] `go test ./...` passes (including new tests for GetRequest, DeleteRequest, RetryRequest)
- [x] `go vet ./...` clean

content.text:
There are no actionable review comments on PR #36. The only review is from the Gemini Code Assist bot, which says "I have no feedback to provide." There are no issue-level comments or inline review comments requesting changes.

The PR is clean — nothing to address.
